autocorrelation.identification_hint: ACF tails off, PACF cuts off -> suggests an AR(p) (p ~ last significant PACF lag)

welch.reference: Welch 1967, IEEE Trans. Audio Electroacoust. 15(2):70-73, DOI 10.1109/TAU.1967.1161901

cusum.reference: Brown, Durbin & Evans 1975 lineage; statsmodels breaks_cusumolsresid (Ploberger-Kramer OLS-CUSUM)

changepoints.note: change points detected on the STL-deseasonalized series (strong seasonality would otherwise flag every peak/trough)

complexity.reference: Richman & Moorman 2000, DOI 10.1152/ajpheart.2000.278.6.H2039; Bandt & Pompe 2002, DOI 10.1103/PhysRevLett.88.174102; BDS: Broock et al. 1996, DOI 10.1080/07474939608800353

catch22.reason: pycatch22 not installed (requires a C toolchain to build the extension)

hurst.reference: Hurst 1951, Trans. ASCE 116:770-799 (R/S); Peng et al. 1994, Phys. Rev. E 49:1685-1689 (DFA)

multifractal.error: ValueError: MF-DFA needs a longer series (>= ~200 points) for a stable spectrum

nonlinear.skipped: series too short (n=180 < 400) for the chaos panel

causality.skipped: univariate case (no covariate series to relate)
